heat.title: Shock, Stress, Opportunity
heat.description: A framework for classifying climate pressure across Western counties — shock, stress, and opportunity — and what each trajectory means for labor, health, energy, infrastructure, and agriculture.

aei.title: Anthropic Economic Index
aei.description: Longitudinal panel tracking AI task share and automation rates across occupation groups — with focus on where lower-income workers are concentrated.

sbi.title: Survival Budget Index
sbi.description: A county-level cost-of-sufficiency index: what it actually costs to not be poor in western states, built from three independent budget calculators.
